judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains group organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search, and AGENTS.md grouping; characterizes /llms-full.txt as monolithic and not split by group; and lists many valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor).
